search_tools.description: Adds BM25 text search over tool names/descriptions for large catalogs. serializer: null | 'markdown' | 'json'

code_mode.description: Experimental: LLM gets meta-tools (search, inspect, execute) instead of full catalog

version_filter.description: Filter tool catalog by component version. include_unversioned keeps tools without explicit versions.

response_limiting.description: UTF-8-safe truncation of oversized tool responses

multi_auth.description: Compose multiple token verifiers (e.g., internal JWTs + third-party OAuth)

component_versioning.description: Deprecated OpenAPI endpoints get version annotations

opentelemetry.description: OpenTelemetry tracing with MCP semantic conventions
